purpose: Provides an escape function for RegExp special characters to ensure safe regex usage.
concerns: No tests listed for different edge cases of regex escaping.
Usage of RegExp.escape() natively may reduce dependency usage.
No explicit type-checking or linting mentioned in README.
Available files for distribution are clearly listed.
Licensing under MIT allows for external contributions.
